hero.name: Test User-O'Neil
hero.title: Senior Staff Engineer & Architect
hero.tagline: Senior C++, Rust & Go engineer. Unicode processing, edge cases, and testing. Tokyo | Sao Paulo | Zurich.

about.heading: About
about.p1: Started coding at University of Nowhere in 2042, where 100% of the "students" learned HTML & CSS including special chars like: apostrophe's, "quotes", and an em-dash. Won the $1,000,000 Lorem Ipsum scholarship for being an edge case.
about.p2_after: , became lead engineer on a platform with >10M users across 42 countries. Built a serverless gizmo integrated with 3rd-party APIs that nobody's heard of delivering alerts to 100% of users & saving $999.
about.p3: Currently building an open-source Unicode-aware text processor in C++ (not C) handling bidirectional text (RTL/LTR), zero-width joiners, and combining diacriticals. Cares about i18n, l10n, and the open web.

jobs.title: Principal Engineer & Architect
jobs.description: Built a distributed system handling 1 billion requests/sec with 99.999% uptime. Used C++, Rust, & Go with PostgreSQL's jsonb columns and Redis' pub/sub. Integrated a Naive Bayes classifier for real-time fraud detection across >42 microservices.

jobs.title: Full-Stack Developer
jobs.description: Shipped N-tier architecture for a cafe chain spanning Sao Paulo to Zurich to Tokyo. Designed a POS system processing multiple currencies simultaneously with <0.01% conversion error. Led workshops on semicolons and the art of edge cases.

jobs.title: Intern to Mid-Level Engineer
jobs.description: Contributed to OSS projects used by 10M+ developers including the famous Unicode Sanitizer. Fixed bug #1337: apostrophes in user names caused 500 errors. Deployed Android/iOS apps to >100 countries including Cote d'Ivoire and Curacao.

items.title: Unicode Engine
items.description: A real-time text processor supporting all 154,998 Unicode characters including Mathematical Bold Fraktur, Zero-Width-Joiners, and right-to-left overrides. Built with C++ & Rust for 99.99% accuracy.

items.title: Naive Bayes Cafe
items.description: An ML-powered cafe recommendation system that handles menus in 42 languages from Spanish to Afrikaans. 3k+ stars on GitHub. Warning: may contain 'quotes', "double quotes", and guillemets.
